Enable “Adjust for best performance.”
• Disable unnecessary startup applications.
• It is recommended to run the game on an SSD.
────────────────────────────
Game Running in Background
In some cases, the game may not close properly, causing a freeze at the loading screen.
What to check:
• Check if Firstmyko or Knight Online client is still running in the system tray.
• Open Task Manager using CTRL + SHIFT + ESC.
• End any Knight Online / Firstmyko processes completely.
• Then restart the game via launcher.
────────────────────────────
Additional Solutions
• Temporarily disable antivirus software.
• Run launcher as “Administrator.”
• Turn off Windows Defender real-time protection temporarily.
• Install DirectX and Visual C++ packages.
• Complete Windows updates.
────────────────────────────
Recommended System
• OS: Windows 7 (64-bit), Windows 10 (64-bit)
• RAM: Minimum 8 GB recommended
• Storage: SSD recommended
────────────────────────────
If the issue persists, contact support.
Have a good game.
